name: RABBIT-CAGE-19
title: Workflow scripts assume bash — break on tcsh: while-read and status variable
description: When Claude runs backlog listing commands on a tcsh host, bash-specific constructs fail: (1) 'while read f; do ...' is bash syntax — tcsh has no while-read loop; (2) 'status' is a reserved read-only variable in tcsh, making 'status=$(...)' illegal. Error: '(eval):3: read-only variable: status'. Root cause: scripts and contracts do not account for tcsh as the user shell. Requirement: all workflow scripts and contracts must support both bash and csh/tcsh.
